title: K-MART Air Fryer Liners Disposable, 6.3 Inch 100pcs Round, Non-Stick, Heat Resistant, Food Grade Parchment Baking Paper, Compatible with Ninja, Tower, COSORI, Russell Hobbs (6.3 Inch 100pcs Round)
features: 𝐍𝐎𝐍-𝐒𝐓𝐈𝐂𝐊 & 𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐓𝐎 𝐂𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐍: Our disposable air fryer liners are made from premium food-grade parchment paper, ensuring your food won't stick to the basket, making cleanup a breeze.

𝐇𝐄𝐀𝐓 𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐍𝐓 & 𝐖𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐏𝐑𝐎𝐎𝐅: These airfryer liners disposable are heat resistant up to 446°F (230°C). These baking paper air fryer liners is waterproof and oil proof, preventing any grease or food residue from spoiling your air fryer.
𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐅𝐄𝐂𝐓 𝐒𝐈𝐙𝐄 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐘𝐎𝐔𝐑 𝐀𝐈𝐑 𝐅𝐑𝐘𝐄𝐑: Each round air fryer liners measures 6.3 inches, perfectly fitting liners for air fryer baskets, ensuring even cooking and no food spills.

𝐌𝐔𝐋𝐓𝐈𝐏𝐔𝐑𝐏𝐎𝐒𝐄 𝐔𝐒𝐄: These air fryer paper liners perfect for baking, grilling, steaming, and roasting. These air fryer liner can also be used in the microwave, oven, and steamer, providing versatile cooking options.

𝐄𝐂𝐎-𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐘 & 𝐒𝐀𝐅𝐄: These air fryer accessories is made from 100% food-grade. These baking parchment paper for air fryer are biodegradable and environmentally friendly. These parchment paper for baking are also free from harmful chemicals, ensuring safe and healthy cooking.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Perfect Table Setting Use the liners to set the table quickly and easily. Simple and practical, save yourself the hassle of washing up later. Easy Cooking - Happy Living These paper liners for air fryer effectively isolate grease stains, remove food debris from the fryer, and extend the life of your air fryer. Multi-Machine Compatibility Made out of natural, unbleached wood pulp. And unlike bleached, white sheets, does not contain harmful chemicals. Also it is fluorescent free. Wide Utility These disposable paper liners are perfect for cooking, baking, and serving in air fryers, microwaves, ovens, and more. No More Dirty Air Fryer Keep Your Air Fryer Clean and Long-Lasting with These Paper Liners These air fryer paper liners are perfect for keeping grease stains at bay, preventing food residue buildup, and extending the lifespan of your air fryer. Reduces cleaning time significantly, allowing you to enjoy your meals without worrying about tedious cleanup. The liners’ non-stick surface ensures food doesn’t stick to the fryer, making serving and removing food hassle-free. No cutting or adjusting needed; simply place the liner in your air fryer and start cooking. Spot the Difference: Choose Perfect, Cook Smarter! Rectangular Air Fryer Liners Square Air Fryer Liners Round Air Fryer Liners Size 5.5 x 8.6 x 1.77 inches Size 6.3 x 7.9 x 1.77 inches Size 6.3 x 7.9 x 1.77 inches Fit For Perfectly designed for most dual basket Air Fryer Fit For Perfectly designed for 7-inch to 9-inch air fryer baskets Fit For Perfectly designed for 7-inch to 9-inch air fryer baskets Material High-quality food-grade parchment paper, non-toxic, and BPA-free for safe and healthy cooking. Sizes Available in round, square, and rectangular to fit a wide range of air fryer. Pre-Cut Perfection No need for scissors—precisely cut to standard air fryer sizes for convenience and ease of use. Heat Resistance Up to 230°C Sheet count 100 liners per pack Thickness 45gsm paper Will the liners burn or catch fire in the air fryer? No, they are heat-resistant up to 230°C. Ensure they are weighted down with food to prevent them from flying around in the air fryer. Do they affect the taste of the food? No, these air fryer liners are neutral and will not alter the flavor or aroma of your meals. Can I use these air fryer paper for wet or greasy foods? Absolutely! These parchment paper for baking are waterproof and oil-proof, preventing grease or food residue from spoiling your air fryer. Are these air fryer paper liners sustainable? Yes, these baking papers are recyclable and made from sustainable materials, making them a green choice for your cooking needs. Are these airfryer liners reusable? No, these air fryer liners disposable for convenient, hassle-free cleanup.
